series.title: Vikings 2026!
series.tagline: A forgotten fleet wakes in ice and starlight.
series.shortDescription: When ancient longships surface near a wormhole fringe, modern scouts must decide whether to fight, flee, or forge a new pact.

series.title: Stardust Station
series.tagline: One outpost. A thousand quiet catastrophes.
series.shortDescription: A relay station at the edge of mapped space becomes the crossroads for drifters, diplomats, and disasters.

series.title: Azure Reach
series.tagline: The ocean world remembers every footprint.
series.shortDescription: Explorers descend into floating cities and abyssal ruins where every discovery rewrites their mission charter.

series.title: Sunforge Outlaw
series.tagline: Heists are easy. Escaping a star is harder.
series.shortDescription: A rogue engineer steals fusion cores from military foundries and sparks a rebellion in the furnace lanes.
